title: Tomorrow, and Tomorrow, and Tomorrow
creator: Gabrielle Zevin
note: A novel about making things — the obsession, the friction, the meaning found in building something with someone. Hits differently when you spend your days shipping code.

title: The Likeness (Dublin Murder Squad, #2)
creator: Tana French
note: Detective fiction where the real subject is identity and belonging. French writes atmosphere better than almost anyone — the kind of book you finish in a weekend without noticing.
